{"name":"410b03a03542e800f1c6","layouts":[{"id":0,"position":{"x":8.90138715478702,"y":68.01568517584431,"z":3000,"width":383.58208955223876,"height":498.5074626865671,"tabOrder":3000}}],"singleVisual":{"visualType":"textbox","drillFilterOtherVisuals":true,"objects":{"general":[{"properties":{"paragraphs":[{"textRuns":[{"value":"Release v1.2","textStyle":{"fontSize":"12pt","color":"#666666"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"Date: 09/01/2025","textStyle":{"fontSize":"12pt","color":"#666666"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"About the information in this report:","textStyle":{"fontWeight":"bold","fontSize":"12pt","color":"#666666"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"From 30 November 2017, as part of the new contracts, a number of changes have been made to the manner in which operational performance is measured, including:","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"The definition of the % timetable delivered has changed for metropolitan trains operator, Metro. From this date services that are altered to express through a station will result in a lower % timetable delivered outcome. The # skip services (Train) field presented in this report reflects the new measure reporting requirements incorporated in the new contract.","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"The definition of % ontime has changed for tram operator, Yarra Trams. From this date punctuality will be measured based on when a service ","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light"}},{"value":"arrives","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light","textDecoration":"underline"}},{"value":" at a punctuality monitoring point for lateness and when it ","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light"}},{"value":"departs","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light","textDecoration":"underline"}},{"value":" from that point for earliness. Previously only the departure time was used. This new approach more closely aligns with the key passenger outcomes (did I miss the tram because it was running early or was I late to my appointment because the tram arrived late) and how the new EOPR incentive regime determines early and late running. In this report historical information is adjusted to provide a consistent measure of performance over time.","textStyle":{"fontFamily":"Segoe UI Light"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]}]}}]}},"parentGroupName":"86988aff9b6f299e1ec5"}

{"name":"5788f7d0df93564882d6","layouts":[{"id":0,"position":{"x":8.030765420053656,"y":21.63631031323778,"z":500,"width":381.995064666865,"height":364.99231698139624,"tabOrder":9001}}],"singleVisual":{"visualType":"textbox","drillFilterOtherVisuals":true,"objects":{"general":[{"properties":{"paragraphs":[{"textRuns":[{"value":"Updates on metrics: ","textStyle":{"fontWeight":"bold","fontSize":"12pt","color":"#666666"}}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":" Skips : ","textStyle":{"fontWeight":"bold"}},{"value":"In some circumstances the new system reports fewer skip stops services. This is because it removes services that were not scheduled in the master and/or daily to operate at that particular station. This provides a more accurate and consistent reflection"}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":" of the service outcomes.
